segments.text: Yeah, exactly - Sonic's been pressuring this whole time, but Calimero hasn't landed a single punish
segments.original_text: いやそうなんですよねここまでソニックが触っているのにカルメロがリターンの高い行動を一つも当てられていないという

full_text: Yeah, exactly - Sonic's been pressuring this whole time, but Calimero hasn't landed a single punish And then the nair—
